description: Data pretty printer. Provides the ability to print Python data structures in a well-formatted, readable form.

functions.name: pprint

params.name: object
params.description: The object to pretty-print.

params.name: stream
params.description: The output stream. Defaults to sys.stdout.

params.name: indent
params.description: The amount of indentation added for each recursive level. Defaults to 1.

params.name: width
params.description: The desired maximum output width. Defaults to 80.

params.name: depth
params.description: The number of levels which may be printed. Deeper levels are replaced with '...'. None means no limit.

functions.description: Print the formatted representation of object to stream, followed by a newline.

functions.name: pformat

params.name: object
params.description: The object to format.

params.name: indent
params.description: The amount of indentation added for each recursive level. Defaults to 1.

params.name: width
params.description: The desired maximum output width. Defaults to 80.

params.name: depth
params.description: The number of levels which may be printed. None means no limit.

returns.description: The formatted representation as a string.

functions.description: Return the formatted representation of object as a string.

functions.name: isreadable

params.name: object
params.description: The object to check.

returns.description: True if the object's repr is readable (can be used to recreate the value via eval()).

functions.description: Determine whether the formatted representation of the object is readable, meaning it can be used to recreate the value with eval(). Always returns False for recursive objects.

functions.name: isrecursive

params.name: object
params.description: The object to check.

returns.description: True if the object contains a recursive reference.

functions.description: Determine whether the object requires a recursive representation.

functions.name: saferepr

params.name: object
params.description: The object to represent.

returns.description: A string representation of the object, with recursive references marked.

functions.description: Return a string representation of the object, protected against recursive data structures. Recursive references are replaced with a brief '<Recursion on ...>' indicator.

classes.name: PrettyPrinter
classes.description: A class that provides configurable pretty-printing. Construct an instance with formatting parameters, then use its methods to format or print objects.

params.name: indent
params.description: Amount of indentation per nesting level. Defaults to 1.

params.name: width
params.description: Desired maximum output width. Defaults to 80.

params.name: depth
params.description: Number of nesting levels to print. None means unlimited. Defaults to None.

params.name: stream
params.description: Output stream for the pprint method. Defaults to sys.stdout.

methods.name: pprint

params.name: object
params.description: The object to pretty-print.

methods.description: Print the formatted representation of object on the configured stream, followed by a newline.

methods.name: pformat

params.name: object
params.description: The object to format.

methods.description: Return the formatted representation of object as a string, using the configured options.

methods.name: isreadable

params.name: object
params.description: The object to check.

returns.description: True if the repr is readable.

methods.description: Determine whether the formatted representation of the object is readable.

methods.name: isrecursive

params.name: object
params.description: The object to check.

returns.description: True if the object contains a recursive reference.

methods.description: Determine whether the object requires a recursive representation.
